summary: Soft-disable (Inactivar) feature for Cuentas and Contactos - FULLY WORKING. Backend: 9/10 tests passed (1 skipped - contacto not in CRM table). Frontend: All UI elements verified - toggle-inactive in toolbar, toggle-active-btn in detail panel, badge-inactiva, confirm-deactivate-btn modal, toggle-show-inactive-contactos in Contactos tab.

minor.issue: Returns 404 if contacto not yet created in crm.contacto table (expected behavior - contactos are created on-demand when linked)

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <tr>/<span> inside <tbody>. Console warning only, does not affect functionality. This is caused by development tooling wrapper elements.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/contactos/count-active returns total and active counts
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/list excludes inactive cuentas by default
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/list?include_inactive=true includes inactive cuentas with is_active field
Backend: PATCH /api/cuentas/{id}/active with is_active=false deactivates cuenta and returns contactos_affected count
Backend: PATCH /api/cuentas/{id}/active with is_active=true reactivates cuenta and returns contactos_reactivated count
Backend: Deactivated cuenta is excluded from GET /api/cuentas/list without include_inactive
Backend: Deactivated cuenta is included in GET /api/cuentas/list?include_inactive=true
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/contactos?include_inactive=true returns contactos with is_active field
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id} returns is_active, inactive_reason, inactive_at fields after deactivation
Frontend: Clicking 'Inactivar' opens confirmation modal with confirm button (data-testid=confirm-deactivate-btn)
Frontend: After deactivation - INACTIVA badge appears (data-testid=badge-inactiva), button changes to 'Activar', toast 'Cuenta inactivada'
Frontend: Clicking 'Activar' reactivates account - badge disappears, button changes to 'Inactivar', toast 'Cuenta activada'
Frontend: Contactos tab shows 'Mostrar inactivos' toggle (data-testid=toggle-show-inactive-contactos)
Frontend: Contactos tab shows table with Estado column and Accion buttons
critical_code_review_comments: server.py PATCH /api/cuentas/{id}/active: Properly cascades deactivation to contactos with CASCADE_ACCOUNT reason
server.py PATCH /api/cuentas/{id}/active: On reactivation, only reactivates contactos with CASCADE_ACCOUNT or CASCADE_CONTACT reasons (not manually deactivated)
server.py PATCH /api/contactos/{id}/active: Principal contacto cascade logic correctly triggers cuenta deactivation
db.py: Soft-disable columns (is_active, manual_inactive, inactive_reason, inactive_at, inactive_by) correctly added via ALTER TABLE IF NOT EXISTS
CuentaDetailPanel.jsx: Toggle button correctly shows 'Inactivar'/'Activar' based on is_active state
CuentaDetailPanel.jsx: Confirmation modal shows account name and active contactos count before deactivation
CuentasToolbar.jsx: 'Inactivos' toggle correctly passes include_inactive filter to API
ContactosTab.jsx: 'Mostrar inactivos' toggle and individual contacto toggle buttons working
seed_data_creation: None - used existing PostgreSQL data. Account tested: ABREGU CASTILLO FRITZ ANTONY
context_for_next_testing_agent: Soft-disable feature fully verified. Key endpoints: PATCH /api/cuentas/{id}/active (with {is_active: bool, reason: str|null}), GET /api/cuentas/list?include_inactive=true, GET /api/cuentas/{id}/contactos/count-active, PATCH /api/contactos/{id}/active. UI data-testids: toggle-inactive (toolbar), toggle-active-btn (detail panel), badge-inactiva, confirm-deactivate-btn (modal), toggle-show-inactive-contactos (Contactos tab). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_soft_disable.py. Cascade behavior: deactivating cuenta cascades to contactos with CASCADE_ACCOUNT reason; reactivating cuenta only reactivates CASCADE_* contactos (not manually deactivated ones).
